properties.full_address: 777 Isle of Capri Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL 33069
properties.developers: The Cordish Companies and Caesars Entertainment
properties.description: The 223-acre development is bringing a mixed-use hospitality destination to Pompano Beach, anchored by a Live! dining and entertainment district.

properties.full_address: 100 West Atlantic Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL 33060
properties.description: Pompano Beach is revitalizing its downtown with a $2 billion 75-acre redevelopment, which will include 4 million square feet of residential and commercial space and a new City Hall.

properties.full_address: 1350 South Ocean Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL 33062
properties.developers: Related Group and Merrimac Ventures in collaboration with Hilton
properties.description: The 2-acre beachfront site will house 92 luxury residences, over 85 percent of which are under contract. Completion is slated for summer 2027.

properties.full_address: 1380 South Ocean Boulevard, Pompano Beach, Florida 33062
properties.developers: Fortune International Group and Oak Capital
properties.description: The residential project features two towers with 205 luxury residences ranging from 1,100 to 6,500 square feet. Only three units remain for sale, a source said.

properties.full_address: 20 North Ocean Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL 33062
properties.developers: Related Group and BH Group, in collaboration with Marriott International
properties.description: The 24-story tower includes 77 private residences and 296 condo-hotel units. It's expected to open in 2029.

properties.full_address: 1590 North Federal Highway, Pompano Beach, FL 33062
properties.developers: Affiliates of Aqua Marine Partners and Housing Trust Group
properties.description: The proposed development will add two eight-story buildings with 285 residential units, 11,800 square feet of commercial space and a waterfront promenade to the existing marina.
The 12-acre 356-unit apartment community includes six four-story apartment buildings replaced the Macy's at Pompano Citi Centre, which shuttered in 2020.
Asking prices for the 43 residences at Salato range from $2 million to $5.3 million, U.S. Development CEO John Farina said. They are nearly 70% sold.

properties.full_address: 855-909 South Federal Highway, Pompano Beach, Florida, 33004
properties.description: The proposed mixed-use development would redevelop part of a car dealership to make way for residential and retail space.

properties.full_address: 1550 North Ocean Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL
properties.developers: Joint venture by Vertical Developments, WellDuo, GCF Development, and SP Developments
properties.description: Prices for condos at the two-tower complex start at $5 million, according to Bogatov Realty. Completion is slated for 2028.
The city plans to construct a 35,700-square-feet Emergency Operations Center complex to include Fire Administration, Logistics, and Emergency Center departments.
Construction of Broward County's first Generation V Porsche dealership, which spans 313,000 square feet, is ongoing.

properties.full_address: 900 North Ocean Blvd, Pompano Beach, FL 33062
properties.description: Completed last year, the Casamar tower includes 118 units. Recorded sales ranged from $1.6 million to $6.4 million, according to property records.

properties.full_address: 2250 East Atlantic Boulevard, Pompano Beach, FL
properties.description: The McNab House and Botanical Gardens is being redeveloped to include themed gardens, an event pavilion, education space and a restaurant. Construction is slated to begin later this year.
The 10-story 17-unit boutique project will bring another beachfront luxury apartment to Briny Avenue.
